requirement_topic.zh: 限用物质与电子废弃物处理
requirement_topic.zht: 限用物質與電子廢棄物處理

summary.en: Singapore does not impose an EU-style RoHS marking as a condition of placing a power tool on the market, so there is no standalone RoHS declaration obligation equivalent to the EU regime. Instead, end-of-life and hazardous-material handling is addressed through the National Environment Agency Extended Producer Responsibility scheme for regulated electrical and electronic equipment, which places collection and reporting duties on producers, and through hazardous-substance controls for specific chemicals. Exporters should screen whether their tool category and battery fall within the regulated e-waste product list.
summary.zh: 新加坡不以欧盟式 RoHS 标识作为电动工具投放市场的条件，因此不存在与欧盟制度对应的独立 RoHS 声明义务。取而代之，报废和有害材料处理通过国家环境局针对受规管电气电子设备的生产者延伸责任计划处理，对生产者施加回收和报告义务，并通过针对特定化学品的有害物质控制处理。出口商应筛查其工具类别和电池是否属于受规管电子废弃物产品清单。
summary.zht: 新加坡不以歐盟式 RoHS 標識作為電動工具投放市場的條件，因此不存在與歐盟制度對應的獨立 RoHS 聲明義務。取而代之，報廢和有害材料處理透過國家環境局針對受規管電氣電子設備的生產者延伸責任計劃處理，對生產者施加回收和報告義務，並透過針對特定化學品的有害物質控制處理。出口商應篩查其工具類別和電池是否屬於受規管電子廢棄物產品清單。

standards_or_laws: National Environment Agency Extended Producer Responsibility scheme for regulated electrical and electronic equipment (e-waste)
Hazardous-substance controls for specific chemicals where applicable
No Singapore equivalent to an EU RoHS marking as a market-access condition

summary.en: China power-tool files may include China RoHS material declarations alongside GB/T 3883 safety evidence. China RoHS material data can support an e-waste and material review, but it does not by itself create or satisfy Singapore producer-responsibility registration or reporting duties.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具文件可能在 GB/T 3883 安全证据之外包含中国 RoHS 材料声明。中国 RoHS 材料数据可支持电子废弃物和材料审查，但其本身不会产生或满足新加坡生产者责任注册或报告义务。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具文件可能在 GB/T 3883 安全證據之外包含中國 RoHS 材料聲明。中國 RoHS 材料數據可支援電子廢棄物和材料審查，但其本身不會產生或滿足新加坡生產者責任註冊或報告義務。

standards_or_laws: China RoHS material declarations where applicable

gap.en: The gap is not an EU-style RoHS marking but producer-responsibility screening. If the tool category is regulated e-waste in Singapore, the responsible party may need EPR registration, take-back arrangements, and reporting. China RoHS data helps with material review but does not discharge these Singapore duties.
gap.zh: 差距不是欧盟式 RoHS 标识，而是生产者责任筛查。若该工具类别在新加坡属于受规管电子废弃物，责任方可能需要 EPR 注册、回收安排和报告。中国 RoHS 数据有助于材料审查，但不能免除这些新加坡义务。
gap.zht: 差距不是歐盟式 RoHS 標識，而是生產者責任篩查。若該工具類別在新加坡屬於受規管電子廢棄物，責任方可能需要 EPR 註冊、回收安排和報告。中國 RoHS 數據有助於材料審查，但不能免除這些新加坡義務。

target.en: No mandatory EU-style RoHS marking for Singapore market access. Mandatory duties may arise under the National Environment Agency Extended Producer Responsibility scheme where the tool category is regulated e-waste, and under hazardous-substance controls for specific chemicals.
target.zh: 新加坡市场准入没有欧盟式 RoHS 强制标识。当工具类别属于受规管电子废弃物时，可能在国家环境局生产者延伸责任计划下产生强制义务，并在针对特定化学品的有害物质控制下产生义务。
target.zht: 新加坡市場准入沒有歐盟式 RoHS 強制標識。當工具類別屬於受規管電子廢棄物時，可能在國家環境局生產者延伸責任計劃下產生強制義務，並在針對特定化學品的有害物質控制下產生義務。

cn.en: China RoHS or GB/T 3883 evidence supports material review but does not satisfy Singapore producer-responsibility duties.
cn.zh: 中国 RoHS 或 GB/T 3883 证据支持材料审查，但不能满足新加坡生产者责任义务。
cn.zht: 中國 RoHS 或 GB/T 3883 證據支援材料審查，但不能滿足新加坡生產者責任義務。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No EU-style RoHS marking gates Singapore entry, but the tool category should be screened against the National Environment Agency Extended Producer Responsibility e-waste scope and hazardous-substance controls; China RoHS data supports material review only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 没有欧盟式 RoHS 标识作为新加坡入境门槛，但应将工具类别按国家环境局生产者延伸责任电子废弃物范围和有害物质控制进行筛查；中国 RoHS 数据仅支持材料审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 沒有歐盟式 RoHS 標識作為新加坡入境門檻，但應將工具類別按國家環境局生產者延伸責任電子廢棄物範圍和有害物質控制進行篩查；中國 RoHS 數據僅支援材料審查。

summary.en: Singapore does not have a single EU-style battery regulation imposing battery passport, removability, and conformity-marking duties as a market-access condition. The lithium battery pack of a cordless tool is governed by product-safety expectations under the relevant SS or IEC battery and tool standards within any applicable SAFETY Mark file, by lithium-battery transport rules for shipment, and by National Environment Agency battery and e-waste producer-responsibility obligations at end of life. Cordless tools that contain a wireless function additionally require IMDA registration.
summary.zh: 新加坡没有欧盟式单一电池法规将电池护照、可拆卸性和合规标识作为市场准入条件。无绳工具的锂电池包受相关 SS 或 IEC 电池和工具标准在任何适用 SAFETY Mark 文件内的产品安全预期、运输环节的锂电池运输规则以及国家环境局报废阶段的电池和电子废弃物生产者责任义务约束。含无线功能的无绳工具还须 IMDA 注册。
summary.zht: 新加坡沒有歐盟式單一電池法規將電池護照、可拆卸性和合規標識作為市場准入條件。無繩工具的鋰電池包受相關 SS 或 IEC 電池和工具標準在任何適用 SAFETY Mark 文件內的產品安全預期、運輸環節的鋰電池運輸規則以及國家環境局報廢階段的電池和電子廢棄物生產者責任義務約束。含無線功能的無繩工具還須 IMDA 註冊。

standards_or_laws: Relevant SS or IEC battery and tool safety standards within any applicable SAFETY Mark file
National Environment Agency battery and e-waste producer-responsibility obligations
IMDA registration where the cordless tool has a wireless function

summary.en: China tool files often treat the battery pack as an accessory tested with the tool under GB/T 3883, or rely on separate lithium-battery safety and transport evidence such as UN 38.3. Singapore handling is split across product safety, transport, and producer-responsibility duties rather than a single battery marking.
summary.zh: 中国工具文件通常将电池包作为随工具按 GB/T 3883 测试的附件，或依赖单独的锂电池安全和运输证据如 UN 38.3。新加坡的处理分散在产品安全、运输和生产者责任义务上，而非单一电池标识。
summary.zht: 中國工具文件通常將電池包作為隨工具按 GB/T 3883 測試的附件，或依賴單獨的鋰電池安全和運輸證據如 UN 38.3。新加坡的處理分散在產品安全、運輸和生產者責任義務上，而非單一電池標識。

standards_or_laws: China lithium battery safety and transport evidence such as UN 38.3 where applicable

gap.en: Cordless tools need battery handling addressed across several Singapore tracks rather than one battery regulation: product safety within any SAFETY Mark file, lithium-battery transport for shipment, e-waste and battery producer-responsibility at end of life, and IMDA registration where a wireless function is present. A battery that passes China domestic or transport tests still needs this Singapore mapping.
gap.zh: 无绳工具的电池处理需要在新加坡的多个轨道上落实，而非单一电池法规：任何 SAFETY Mark 文件内的产品安全、出货的锂电池运输、报废阶段的电子废弃物和电池生产者责任，以及存在无线功能时的 IMDA 注册。通过中国国内或运输测试的电池仍需进行这一新加坡映射。
gap.zht: 無繩工具的電池處理需要在新加坡的多個軌道上落實，而非單一電池法規：任何 SAFETY Mark 文件內的產品安全、出貨的鋰電池運輸、報廢階段的電子廢棄物和電池生產者責任，以及存在無線功能時的 IMDA 註冊。通過中國國內或運輸測試的電池仍需進行這一新加坡映射。

target.en: No single mandatory EU-style battery regulation in Singapore. Mandatory obligations are distributed: product safety within any applicable SAFETY Mark file, lithium-battery transport rules for shipment, National Environment Agency battery and e-waste producer-responsibility duties, and IMDA registration for wireless-enabled cordless tools.
target.zh: 新加坡没有单一的欧盟式强制电池法规。强制义务分散：任何适用 SAFETY Mark 文件内的产品安全、出货的锂电池运输规则、国家环境局电池和电子废弃物生产者责任义务，以及具备无线功能的无绳工具的 IMDA 注册。
target.zht: 新加坡沒有單一的歐盟式強制電池法規。強制義務分散：任何適用 SAFETY Mark 文件內的產品安全、出貨的鋰電池運輸規則、國家環境局電池和電子廢棄物生產者責任義務，以及具備無線功能的無繩工具的 IMDA 註冊。

cn.en: China tool and battery evidence such as GB/T 3883 and UN 38.3 does not automatically satisfy Singapore product-safety, transport, and producer-responsibility duties.
cn.zh: 中国工具和电池证据如 GB/T 3883 和 UN 38.3 不会自动满足新加坡产品安全、运输和生产者责任义务。
cn.zht: 中國工具和電池證據如 GB/T 3883 和 UN 38.3 不會自動滿足新加坡產品安全、運輸和生產者責任義務。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Singapore-ready for cordless tools until the battery pack is mapped across product safety within any SAFETY Mark file, lithium-battery transport, e-waste and battery producer-responsibility, and IMDA registration where wireless; there is no single EU-style battery regulation to satisfy.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于无绳工具，在电池包按任何 SAFETY Mark 文件内的产品安全、锂电池运输、电子废弃物和电池生产者责任以及含无线时的 IMDA 注册逐项映射之前，不能视为新加坡就绪；不存在需要满足的单一欧盟式电池法规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於無繩工具，在電池包按任何 SAFETY Mark 文件內的產品安全、鋰電池運輸、電子廢棄物和電池生產者責任以及含無線時的 IMDA 註冊逐項映射之前，不能視為新加坡就緒；不存在需要滿足的單一歐盟式電池法規。
